---
title: "Today"
description: "The daily MLB signal desk from The SABRhood."
---

::: {.page-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">The daily desk</span>

# Today in the SABRhood

The schedule-first research desk: what is happening tonight, who is expected to play, and which matchup signals deserve follow-up.
:::

{{< include includes/today-dashboard.html >}}

::: {.section-action}
[Open the Story Engine](story-desk.qmd){.btn .btn-sabr-navy}
[Explore matchup edges](matchups.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-sabr}
[Open the performance race room](races.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Open the complete History Desk](history.qmd){.btn .btn-metallic}
:::
